schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
schemes.description: An initiative by the government of India in which all farmers will get up to ₹6,000 per year as minimum income support.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) into bank accounts

schemes.title: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
schemes.description: Providing health cover of ₹5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization to poor and vulnerable families.
benefits: Health cover up to ₹5,00,000 per family per year
Cashless access to health care services for the beneficiary at the point of service

schemes.title: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Credit-linked subsidy scheme aimed at generating self-employment opportunities through establishment of micro-enterprises.
benefits: Margin Money subsidy of 15% to 35% of project cost
Bank loan of 90% to 95% of the project cost

schemes.title: National Scheme of Incentive to Girls for Secondary Education
schemes.description: To promote enrollment of girl child in the age group of 14-18 at secondary stage, especially those who passed Class VIII.
benefits: Sum of ₹3000 deposited as fixed deposit
Withdrawal allowed upon reaching 18 years of age and passing 10th class.

schemes.title: Stand-up India Scheme
schemes.description: Facilitate bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 Crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise.
benefits: Bank loan between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 Crore

schemes.title: PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi (PM SVANidhi)
schemes.description: A special micro-credit facility to provide affordable loans to street vendors.
benefits: Working capital loan up to ₹10,000
Interest subsidy of 7% per annum on regular repayment
Incentives on digital transactions

schemes.title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY-U)
schemes.description: Provides central assistance to implementing agencies through States/UTs to provide houses to all eligible families against the validated demand.
benefits: Subsidized housing loans
Direct financial assistance for house construction

schemes.title: Digital India Internship Scheme
schemes.description: Opportunity for students to secure practical experience related to Ministry’s activities.
benefits: Stipend of ₹10,000 per month
Certificate of Internship

schemes.title: Upcoming: PM Universal Basic Youth Income
schemes.description: OVERVIEW: This is a proposed scheme currently under discussion by the government. It aims to provide a baseline digital allowance to all qualifying students to support digital learning access. *NOTE: This scheme is not yet approved and is purely under parliament discussion.*
benefits: Proposed ₹1,500 monthly digital stipend
Free baseline 5G internet data tier (Proposed)

schemes.title: Upcoming: National Agri-Drone Subsidy Initiative
schemes.description: OVERVIEW: Under discussion phase by the cabinet. This scheme aims to subsidize drone purchases for farmers to modernize pesticide administration and crop monitoring. *NOTE: This scheme is primarily in discussion phase, await final cabinet approval notification.*
benefits: Proposed 50% subsidy on agricultural drone purchases
Free drone piloting certification training
